meta.default_description: Minova Commerce is a global trading and distribution partner connecting manufacturers, suppliers, and customers across consumer, lifestyle, and industrial markets.

services.title: Service pillars built around your supply chain.
services.blurb: From sourcing to last-mile distribution — six service pillars that scale up or down to match the deal.

links.sourcing_desc: Vetted manufacturers, qualified samples, transparent pricing.
links.brokerage_desc: Negotiation, contracting, settlement on your behalf.

industries.title: Twelve industries. One operating discipline.
industries.blurb: We trade across consumer, lifestyle and industrial categories — with category specialists in each.

hero.body: We connect manufacturers, suppliers and customers across consumer, lifestyle and industrial markets — sourcing, distributing, and brokering with the precision the deal demands.

what_we_do.body: Minova is built around three service pillars that move together. We source what others can't, distribute where others won't, and broker on terms that hold up after the handshake.

tiles.sourcing_title: Find the right product, at the right price.
tiles.sourcing_body: Vetted manufacturers across 40+ countries, qualified samples, transparent pricing, and the contract muscle to lock it in.
tiles.distribution_title: Move it where it needs to be.
tiles.distribution_body: Multi-modal logistics, regional warehousing, last-mile coverage. Goods arrive on time, in spec, with documents in order.
tiles.brokerage_body: Commercial intermediation between buyers and sellers — long-term partnerships, not one-off deals.

global_reach.body: Operations radiate from our Swiss desk through eight regional hubs — every active lane has named operators and pre-negotiated freight, customs and warehousing capacity.

how_we_work.body: Every project follows the same four-step protocol — adapted to category, volume and geography. One operator. One thread. One outcome.

steps.discover_body: We map the brief — product, volume, target markets, lead time, regulatory constraints — and translate it into a sourcing strategy.
steps.source_body: Vetted manufacturers, factory audits, qualified samples, transparent costing. You see what we see, with nothing skipped.
steps.negotiate_body: Commercial terms structured for the long game: payment, incoterms, exclusivity, dispute mechanisms. We sign so you don't.
steps.deliver_body: Multi-modal logistics, customs, documents, last-mile. Real-time updates and one accountable point of contact end to end.

industries_section.body: Category specialists in each industry — because moving cosmetics through customs is not the same problem as routing industrial components through three modes of freight.

cards.consumer_body: FMCG, packaged food, household essentials moving across continents at retail cadence.
cards.lifestyle_body: Apparel, accessories, leisure and design — brand-led trade with a feel for the category.
cards.industrial_body: Components, raw materials and equipment for manufacturers who need them on schedule.
cards.electronics_body: Devices, peripherals and assemblies — sourced with full transparency on origin and spec.
cards.health_body: Personal care, wellness and certified cosmetics, handled with the diligence the category requires.
cards.home_body: Furniture, textiles, kitchen — large-format goods routed through the right freight lanes.

partner_marquee.headline: 150+ partners across 40+ countries — from independent factories to multinational distributors.

testimonials.quote_1: Minova reorganised three of our import lanes inside a quarter and gave us back a margin we'd written off. They run trade like an ops team, not a desk.
testimonials.quote_2: We needed a category specialist who could move 20-foot containers and answer the phone at 11pm. Minova has been that partner for two years.
testimonials.quote_3: Other brokers sell access. Minova sells outcomes. Contracts hold up, deliveries land in spec, and the team owns the problem when it doesn't.

cta.default_headline: Bring us a brief. We'll bring you a market.
cta.default_body: From sourcing to settlement, we run trade end to end. Tell us what you need to move, where, and by when — we'll come back with a path.

footer.headline: Trade, distributed.
footer.blurb: A global trading and distribution partner connecting manufacturers, suppliers and customers — across consumer, lifestyle and industrial markets.

about_page.meta_description: Minova Commerce — a Swiss-based trading and distribution partner connecting manufacturers, suppliers and customers worldwide.
about_page.title: Quietly running trade between manufacturers and the world.
about_page.body: Minova Commerce is a Swiss trading and distribution practice. We connect manufacturers, suppliers and customers — and run the work that turns a contract into a delivered shipment.
about_page.manifesto_text: We don't believe trade is a commodity. We believe it's an operating discipline — and the difference between a shipment that lands and one that doesn't usually comes down to the quiet work nobody talks about.
about_page.manifesto_body: Minova exists to do that quiet work — sourcing, qualifying, contracting, routing, inspecting, settling. We connect manufacturers, suppliers and customers across consumer, lifestyle and industrial markets, and we own the outcome end to end.
about_page.values_headline: Three words. Held to the line.

values.trust_body: Trade is built on what people do when nobody's watching. We agree it in writing, then we do it.
values.flexibility_body: Every category, every lane, every customer is different. Our playbook bends to fit — without losing rigor.
values.reliability_body: On time, in spec, with documents in order. The unsexy promise that makes long-term partnerships possible.

about_page.cta_headline: Start a conversation with the desk.
about_page.cta_body: Most projects begin with a 20-minute call. Tell us what you're trying to move — we'll tell you whether we're the right partner.

services_page.meta_description: Six service pillars — sourcing, distribution, brokerage, intermediation, quality control, logistics — built around your supply chain.
services_page.title: Six pillars. One operating standard.
services_page.body: Trade is rarely one service in isolation. Minova runs the whole stack — and clients can engage on any combination, from a single sourcing brief to a fully managed distribution programme.
services_page.intro_body: Engage Minova on a single brief or run an entire programme through us. The pillars are independent, but they read from the same playbook — that's how clients keep one thread across the whole supply chain.

pillars.sourcing_body: Vetted manufacturers across 40+ countries. We qualify factories on capacity, certifications, financial health and labour standards before a sample ever leaves the line.
pillars.distribution_body: Multi-modal logistics, regional warehousing, last-mile coverage. Goods arrive on time, in spec, with documents in order — and one accountable point of contact.
pillars.distribution_p1: Sea, air, road and intermodal routing
pillars.distribution_p2: Bonded warehousing in key trade corridors
pillars.distribution_p3: Last-mile networks across EU and EFTA
pillars.distribution_p4: Live shipment visibility and KPI reporting
pillars.brokerage_body: Negotiation, contracting and settlement on your behalf. We sign agreements that hold up after the handshake — with payment, incoterms and dispute mechanisms structured for the long game.
pillars.brokerage_p1: Mandated negotiation across buyer and seller
pillars.brokerage_p3: Letters of credit and escrow facilitation
pillars.intermediation_body: Long-term partner matching across regions. We connect manufacturers, brand owners and distributors based on category fit, scale fit, and culture fit — not just availability.
pillars.quality_body: Independent inspection, audits and batch certification. We don't ship what we wouldn't accept — and we make sure you have the paper trail to prove it.
pillars.logistics_body: Customs brokerage, documentation and freight optimization. The unglamorous work that determines whether containers move or sit — handled by people who like that work.
pillars.logistics_p4: Customs bonds and duty deferral schemes

services_page.cta_headline: Bring us your toughest sourcing problem.
services_page.cta_body: The deals other brokers walk away from are often the ones we know how to close. Tell us what's on the table.

industries_page.meta_description: Twelve industries Minova trades across — consumer, lifestyle and industrial — with category specialists in each.
industries_page.title: Twelve industries. One operating discipline.
industries_page.body: Categories differ — but the operating standard doesn't. Minova runs the same trade discipline across consumer, lifestyle and industrial markets, with specialists in each.
industries_page.core_body: Six core verticals where Minova holds long-standing supplier relationships and operating playbooks. Each pulls from the same six service pillars — adapted to category economics.

primary.consumer_body: FMCG, packaged food, household essentials moving across continents at retail cadence. We work with brand owners, importers and large retail buyers.
primary.lifestyle_body: Apparel, accessories, leisure and design — brand-led trade with a feel for the category and the calendar.
primary.industrial_body: Components, raw materials and equipment for manufacturers who need them on schedule and in spec.
primary.electronics_body: Devices, peripherals and assemblies — sourced with full transparency on origin, BOM, and compliance.
primary.health_body: Personal care, wellness and certified cosmetics, handled with the regulatory diligence the category requires.
primary.home_body: Furniture, textiles, kitchen — large-format goods routed through the right freight lanes from the start.

industries_page.cta_body: If your product is adjacent to what we cover, the answer is usually still yes — we'll either run it ourselves or introduce you to someone we trust.

network_page.meta_description: Minova's global partner and supplier network — 150+ partners across 40+ countries, with category specialists in twelve industries.
network_page.title: A network with the receipts.
network_page.body: 150+ partners across 40+ countries — manufacturers, distributors, freight forwarders, customs brokers and inspection labs. Vetted on entry, scored continuously, audited annually.
network_page.map_body: Operations radiate from our Swiss desk through eight regional hubs. Every active lane has named operators and pre-negotiated freight, customs and warehousing capacity.

regions.europe_note: HQ region — bonded warehousing in DACH, Benelux, Iberia.
regions.asia_note: Sourcing concentration in CN, VN, IN, ID, BD.
regions.mena_note: Distribution hubs in UAE, KSA, EG.
regions.americas_note: Brand owners and distributors across NA and LATAM.
regions.africa_note: Emerging West and East Africa lanes.

network_page.standards_headline: A network is only as good as its standards.

standards.vetted_body: Every partner is qualified on capacity, certifications, financial health and labour standards before a first PO.
standards.scored_body: Active partners are scored on delivery accuracy, quality outcomes and responsiveness — and we act on the scorecards.
standards.audited_body: Compliance audits — BSCI, SMETA, ISO — refreshed annually with documented findings shared with clients on request.

network_page.cta_headline: Manufacturers, freight, QC — we're always meeting.
network_page.cta_body: If you run a serious operation in your category, we should know each other. Send us a short profile and we'll come back.

contact_page.meta_description: Send a sourcing, distribution or brokerage brief to Minova Commerce. Response within one business day.
contact_page.title: Bring us a brief. We'll bring you a market.
contact_page.body: Phone, email or send us a short brief — most projects start with three lines and a target date. We respond within one business day.
contact_page.form_headline: Tell us what you need to move.
contact_page.form_body: Most projects start with a short brief — product, volume, target markets, lead time. We'll come back within one business day.
contact_page.field_message_placeholder: Product, target markets, lead time, anything else relevant…
contact_page.form_legal: By submitting, you agree to be contacted regarding your enquiry. We don't share details with third parties.
contact_page.form_success_body: Thanks — a member of the Minova team will be in touch within one business day.
contact_page.form_error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.
contact_page.form_error_rate_limit: Please wait a moment before submitting again.
contact_page.form_error_send_failed: Could not send right now — please email <link>info@minova-commerce.ch</link> directly.
contact_page.form_field_error_email: Please enter a valid email address
contact_page.form_field_error_phone: Please enter a valid phone number
contact_page.form_field_error_message: Please write at least a few words

imprint_page.meta_description: Legal information about Minova Commerce Midzan, a Swiss sole proprietorship registered in the canton of Aargau.
imprint_page.title: Legal information.
imprint_page.purpose_body: Trade, distribution and brokerage of goods and products of all kinds.
imprint_page.liability_content_body: The content of this website has been compiled with the greatest possible care. However, Minova Commerce Midzan provides no guarantee as to the accuracy, completeness or topicality of the content. Liability for any kind of damage arising from the use of the information published — to the extent permitted by Swiss law — is excluded.
imprint_page.liability_links_body: This website may contain links to external third-party websites. We have no influence over the content of those linked sites. At the time of linking, no unlawful content was identifiable. We accept no liability for the content of external linked websites; their operators are solely responsible.
imprint_page.copyright_body: All content, layout, source code and design elements published on this website are protected by Swiss and international copyright law. Reproduction, modification or use of any kind requires the prior written consent of Minova Commerce Midzan.
imprint_page.law_body: This website and any legal relationship arising from its use are governed exclusively by Swiss law, excluding its conflict-of-laws provisions and the United Nations Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods (CISG). The exclusive place of jurisdiction is Aargau, Switzerland.

privacy_page.meta_description: How Minova Commerce Midzan collects, uses and protects personal data under the Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (FADP) and the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
privacy_page.title: Privacy policy.
privacy_page.p_controller_intro: The controller responsible for the processing of personal data on this website is:
privacy_page.p_scope: This privacy policy applies to all personal data we process in connection with the operation of this website, the handling of enquiries received through it, and our wider commercial activities. It is drafted to comply with the Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (revFADP) and, where applicable, the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
privacy_page.p_categories_intro: We may collect and process the following categories of personal data:
privacy_page.li_categories_1: Identification and contact data — e.g. name, company, work email, phone number — provided through our contact form or by email.
privacy_page.li_categories_2: Communication data — the content of messages, briefs, attachments and related correspondence.
privacy_page.li_categories_3: Technical data — IP address, browser type and version, device information, referrer URL, time of access, log files. This data is processed only to the extent necessary to operate the website securely and reliably.
privacy_page.p_purposes_intro: We process personal data for the following purposes:
privacy_page.li_purposes_1: To respond to enquiries and prepare commercial proposals (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR — pre-contractual measures; Art. 31(2)(a) FADP).
privacy_page.li_purposes_2: To fulfil contractual obligations and provide trading, distribution and brokerage services (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR; Art. 31(2)(a) FADP).
privacy_page.li_purposes_3: To comply with legal obligations under Swiss commercial, tax and accounting law (Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR; Art. 31(2)(c) FADP).
privacy_page.li_purposes_4: To safeguard our legitimate interests in operating the website securely and preventing misuse (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR; Art. 31(1) FADP).
privacy_page.p_disclosure: We do not sell personal data. We may disclose personal data to carefully selected processors and partners — including manufacturers, suppliers, freight forwarders, customs brokers, banks, IT providers and professional advisors — only to the extent necessary to perform the underlying contract or to comply with legal obligations. All such recipients are bound by confidentiality and data-protection obligations.
privacy_page.p_transfers: Where personal data is transferred outside Switzerland or the European Economic Area, we ensure that the transfer is covered by an adequate level of data protection — for example, by relying on countries recognised as adequate by the Swiss Federal Council, by signing the Standard Contractual Clauses, or by obtaining the explicit consent of the data subject.
privacy_page.p_retention: Personal data is retained only for as long as required to fulfil the purpose for which it was collected, to comply with legal obligations (in particular Art. 958f of the Swiss Code of Obligations — ten-year retention of business records), or to defend legal claims.
privacy_page.li_rights_1: request information about the personal data we hold about you;
privacy_page.li_rights_2: request the rectification or deletion of your data;
privacy_page.li_rights_3: request the restriction of processing or object to processing based on legitimate interests;
privacy_page.li_rights_4: request data portability, where the legal conditions for portability are met;
privacy_page.li_rights_5: withdraw consent at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of processing based on consent before its withdrawal;
privacy_page.li_rights_6: lodge a complaint with the Swiss Federal Data Protection and Information Commissioner (FDPIC) or, where the GDPR applies, with the supervisory authority in your EU/EEA country of residence.
privacy_page.p_rights_outro: To exercise any of these rights, please write to {emailLink}.
privacy_page.p_cookies: This website uses only the cookies strictly necessary for its operation (e.g. session and security cookies). We do not use third-party analytics, profiling or advertising cookies without your prior consent. Should this change, this policy will be updated and consent will be requested before any non-essential cookie is set.
privacy_page.p_security: We take appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect personal data against unauthorised access, loss, alteration or disclosure. Communications over the internet (e.g. email) cannot, however, be guaranteed to be fully secure.
privacy_page.p_changes: We may update this policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or applicable law. The current version is always available on this page, with the date of the last update shown at the top.

terms_page.meta_description: Terms governing the use of the Minova Commerce website. Swiss law applies; jurisdiction Aargau, Switzerland.
terms_page.title: Terms of use.
terms_page.p_operator: This website is operated by {company}, {address}. Owner: {owner}. Commercial Register Number {cr} ({office}). VAT/UID {vat}.
terms_page.p_scope: These terms govern the use of this website. By accessing or using the website you accept these terms in full. If you do not agree, please refrain from using the website.
terms_page.p_info: The information published on this website is for general information purposes only and does not constitute a binding offer or commercial advice. Specific commercial proposals are issued in writing on a case-by-case basis. We reserve the right to modify, suspend or discontinue any part of this website at any time without notice.
terms_page.p_ip: All content of this website — including text, graphics, logos, design elements and source code — is the property of {company} or its licensors and is protected by Swiss and international intellectual property law. No part of the website may be reproduced, distributed, modified or otherwise exploited without our prior written consent.
terms_page.li_use_1: use the website in violation of any applicable law or regulation;
terms_page.li_use_2: attempt to gain unauthorised access to the website, its servers or any related systems;
terms_page.li_use_3: interfere with the security, integrity or availability of the website;
terms_page.li_use_4: use automated means (scrapers, crawlers, bots) to harvest content or contact data from the website without our prior written consent.
terms_page.p_links: This website may contain links to third-party websites. We have no control over the content, policies or practices of those sites and accept no liability for them. Following an external link is at your own risk.
terms_page.p_liability: To the fullest extent permitted by Swiss law, {company} excludes any liability for direct, indirect, incidental, consequential or punitive damages arising out of or in connection with the use of — or the inability to use — this website, including damages caused by viruses, technical errors, unavailability or loss of data.
terms_page.p_privacy: The processing of personal data is governed by our {privacyLink}, which forms an integral part of these terms.
terms_page.p_law: These terms and any dispute arising from or in connection with the use of this website are governed exclusively by Swiss law, excluding its conflict-of-laws provisions and the United Nations Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods (CISG). The exclusive place of jurisdiction is Aargau, Switzerland.
terms_page.p_contact: Questions about these terms can be sent to {emailLink} or by post to {company}, {address}.

not_found.headline: Looks like this lane isn't on our map.
not_found.body: The page you're looking for has moved or doesn't exist. Let's get you back on course.

cookie_banner.headline: We use cookies
cookie_banner.body: We use essential cookies to make our site work and analytics cookies to understand how you use it. You can accept all or only essential cookies. Read our <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>.
